Admin Commands.name: prune
Admin Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to bulk-delete between 1 and 100 recent messages in a channel.

Task Management Commands.name: tasks
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to view all tasks, optionally filtered by project.

Task Management Commands.name: task-add
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to add a new task to a project. Opens a popup for the title, description, and an optional image.

Task Management Commands.name: task-edit
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to edit a task. Opens a popup with the current values pre-filled; status can also be set directly.

Task Management Commands.name: task-delete
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to delete a task and all of its subtasks and images.

Task Management Commands.name: task-details
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to view the full details of a task.

Task Management Commands.name: task-image-add
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to add an image to a task by uploading a file or pasting a URL, with an optional label.

Task Management Commands.name: task-image-delete
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to remove an image from a task by its image ID (visible in /task-details).

Task Management Commands.name: project-add
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to create a new project.

Task Management Commands.name: project-delete
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to delete a project and ALL of its tasks, subtasks, and images.

Task Management Commands.name: subtask-add
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to add a subtask to an existing task. Opens a popup for the subtask title.

Task Management Commands.name: subtask-edit
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to edit a subtask. Opens a popup with the current title pre-filled.

Task Management Commands.name: subtask-toggle
Task Management Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to toggle a subtask between done and not done.

OneNote Commands.name: onenote
OneNote Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to send a note, links, or images to OneNote. Opens a popup for the text and links, with an optional image attachment.

OneNote Commands.name: onenote-auth
OneNote Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to link her Microsoft account to enable OneNote integration.

OneNote Commands.name: onenote-backup
OneNote Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to back up all OneNote pages to the Obsidian OneNoteBackup vault.

OneNote Commands.name: onenote-setup
OneNote Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to choose which OneNote notebook and section new notes are sent to.

TestFlight Commands.name: testflight-add
TestFlight Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to add a TestFlight program to the watcher. Accepts a join code or a full TestFlight URL, with an optional display name.

TestFlight Commands.name: testflight-remove
TestFlight Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to remove a TestFlight program from the watcher by join code, full URL, or display name.

TestFlight Commands.name: testflight-list
TestFlight Commands.description: Lists the TestFlight programs currently being watched.

Watch Commands.name: watch-add
Watch Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to add a URL/RSS/API watcher that pings her when something changes.

Watch Commands.name: watch-check
Watch Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to run a watcher right now and report the result.

Watch Commands.name: watch-list
Watch Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to list all configured watchers and their current status.

Watch Commands.name: watch-remove
Watch Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to remove a watcher by its id or name.

Utility Commands.name: status-export
Utility Commands.description: Allows **Erin** to refresh the Obsidian status dashboard note from the live dashboard data.
